Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dimsiss Pltf; For Failure To Obey Court Order;
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BRIAN WILLIAMS' Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff For Failure To Obey Court Order will be heard at 9 am on the Discovery calendar. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Defendant Brian William'S Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff For Failure To Obey Court Order
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARILOUR BUSTONERA OF GILSLEIDER, MCMAHON & HERMANSON, TEL. NO. (925) 446-3115 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Brian William'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Obey Court Order is granted. Defendant Brian Williams is dismissed. Plaintiff shall pay defendant Williams sanctions of $1,200.00. ORDER SIGNED. Pro Tem Judge: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Req. For Production Of Documents; Attend Deposition
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT BRIAN WILLIAMS' Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; Attend Deposition is Granted. No opposition filed. Request for sanctions: Granted in the amount of $1,060.00. The Court modified and signed the order submitted with the moving papers. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
